endpoints.label: Complete Chat

fields.label: Model
fields.description: The model which will generate the completion. Learn more.

fields.label: Prompt
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: messages, messages.role, messages.content)

fields.label: Simplify
fields.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

fields.label: Options
fields.description: Additional options to add (JSON object; supported keys: echo, frequency_penalty, maxTokens, n, presence_penalty, temperature, topP)

endpoints.description: Create one or more completions for a given text

endpoints.label: Create Image

fields.label: Prompt
fields.placeholder: e.g. A cute cat eating a dinosaur
fields.description: A text description of the desired image(s). The maximum length is 1000 characters.

fields.label: Model
fields.description: The model to use for image generation

fields.label: Response Format
fields.description: The format in which to return the image(s)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: Additional options to add (JSON object; supported keys: n, quality, size, style)

endpoints.description: Create an image for a given text

endpoints.label: Complete Text

fields.label: Model
fields.description: The model which will generate the completion. Learn more.

fields.label: Prompt
fields.placeholder: e.g. Say this is a test
fields.description: The prompt to generate completion(s) for

fields.label: Simplify
fields.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

fields.label: Options
fields.description: Additional options to add (JSON object; supported keys: echo, frequency_penalty, maxTokens, n, presence_penalty, temperature, topP)

endpoints.description: Create one or more completions for a given text

endpoints.label: Edit Text

fields.label: Model
fields.description: The model which will generate the edited version. Learn more.

fields.label: Input
fields.placeholder: e.g. What day of the wek is it?
fields.description: The input text to be edited

fields.label: Instruction
fields.description: The instruction that tells the model how to edit the input text

fields.label: Simplify
fields.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

fields.label: Options
fields.description: Additional options to add (JSON object; supported keys: echo, frequency_penalty, maxTokens, n, presence_penalty, temperature, topP)

endpoints.description: Create an edited version for a given text

endpoints.label: Moderate Text

fields.label: Model
fields.description: The model which will classify the text. Learn more.

fields.label: Input
fields.description: The input text to classify

fields.label: Simplify
fields.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

endpoints.description: Classify if a text violates OpenAI's content policy
